summary: Iteration 139: Decisions Feature Testing - All tests passed. Backend APIs (GET /api/disputes/decisions/mine, GET /api/disputes/{id}) return correct data with required fields. Frontend Decisions tab on OrganizerDashboard displays 5 resolved disputes with outcome badges, financial impact, and target names. DecisionDetailPage shows all required blocs (outcome, financial, declarations, status). Navigation and back button work correctly. Other dashboard tabs (À venir, Historique, Statistiques) still function properly (regression passed).

backend_api_tests.test_01_login_admin_user: PASS - Admin login returns JWT with access_token
backend_api_tests.test_03_get_my_decisions_returns_list: PASS - Returns decisions array with count
backend_api_tests.test_04_decisions_have_required_fields: PASS - All decisions have dispute_id, appointment_title, final_outcome, financial_impact, my_role, target_name, resolved_at
backend_api_tests.test_05_decisions_only_resolved_statuses: PASS - All decisions have resolved/agreed_* status
backend_api_tests.test_07_get_dispute_detail_returns_data: PASS - Returns dispute detail with dispute_id
backend_api_tests.test_08_dispute_detail_has_financial_con: PASS - financial_context includes penalty_amount, penalty_currency, platform_commission_percent, charity_percent, platform_amount, charity_amount, compensation_amount
backend_api_tests.test_09_dispute_detail_has_declaration_s: PASS - declaration_summary includes declared_absent_count, declared_present_count, has_tech_evidence
backend_api_tests.test_12_regular_user_can_access_decision: PASS - Regular user can access their own decisions

frontend_tests.decisions_tab_visible: PASS - data-testid='tab-decisions' is visible on dashboard
frontend_tests.decisions_tab_clickable: PASS - Tab click updates URL to ?tab=decisions
frontend_tests.decisions_list_loads: PASS - data-testid='decisions-list' is visible after tab click
frontend_tests.decision_cards_displayed: PASS - 5 decision cards found with data-testid='decision-card-{id}'
frontend_tests.decision_card_content: PASS - Cards show appointment title, outcome badge, date, financial impact, target name
frontend_tests.outcome_badge_styling: PASS - Dynamic Tailwind classes (bg-emerald-100, bg-red-100) render correctly
frontend_tests.back_button: PASS - data-testid='back-btn' is visible and functional
frontend_tests.no_console_errors: PASS - No error elements found on page

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/disputes/decisions/mine correctly filters by resolved statuses and enriches with financial_impact
GET /api/disputes/{id} correctly includes financial_context, declaration_summary, evidence_submissions_count
OrganizerDashboard.js Decisions tab (line 1124-1127) uses lazy loading - only fetches on first click
Decision cards (line 1261-1305) display all required fields with proper styling
Dynamic Tailwind classes (bg-${oc.color}-100) ARE working - colors render correctly
DecisionDetailPage.js correctly displays all 5 sections: appointment context, decision finale, financial detail, declarations, status
All data-testid attributes are present for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing resolved disputes in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decisions feature fully implemented and tested. Admin user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has 5 resolved disputes visible in the Decisions tab. The tab is lazy-loaded (fetches data on first click). Known dispute IDs: ef842aec-cb81-4c4f-9b57-64cddeee4c17, 23f75310-958e-4597-baf8-cc3ea0c1470b, e0c1b7a4-8d82-4759-81cf-b0e1092419e7, 01c6bd80-b2a7-43d5-8604-f371b5229db4, 619c6d07-d42f-46ea-8d8b-c64a26225ff5. Dynamic Tailwind classes work correctly despite initial concerns. Login route is /signin.
